ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-region of the country */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country (e.g., low, middle, high) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "hdi_rank" INTEGER /* HDI rank of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hdi_dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dimension */,
  "dimension_name" TEXT /* Name of the dimension */,
  "dimension_description" TEXT /* Description of the dimension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hdi_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the hdi_dimensions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hdi_indicators_dimension_id FOREIGN KEY ("dimension_id") REFERENCES hdi_dimensions ("dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hdi_data" (
  "hdi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HDI data point */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the HDI data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the HDI data was recorded */,
  "hdi_value" REAL /* HDI value for the given year and country */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the hdi_indicators table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hdi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hdi_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hdi_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES hdi_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_hdi_data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "hdi_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the hdi_data table */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_hdi_data_access_hdi_id FOREIGN KEY ("hdi_id") REFERENCES hdi_data ("hdi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_hdi_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data used in the visualization (e.g., JSON object) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date of creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
